name: Bubblegum
description:
✦ Your captain sent the two of you out to restock on food, and he wanted to surprise you (his secret crush) with some flowers... ✦

Kid Pirates Series

Kid Pirate User + Bubblegum

This man could choke me, and I'd thank him. Like ok kinggg... But no, these characters deserve more screen time. He's actually one of my favorite characters though, so I hope you like it...
